name: Sunset Beach
tagline: The crown jewel of the Seven Mile Miracle — where the world's best surfers come to prove themselves every winter.
parking: Street parking along Kamehameha Hwy fills fast in winter; arrive before 9 AM
bestTime: Summer for swimming and sunsets; winter (Nov–Feb) for watching world-class surf competitions
talkStory: In summer this beach is a completely different animal — flat, wide, and perfect for families. Winter is when it earns its reputation with 15–30 ft faces. The Vans Triple Crown runs here in Nov–Dec and it's free to watch from the sand. Grab a plate lunch from a food truck on Kam Hwy and post up. Don't swim when waves are overhead — the currents here are no joke.
